'''鈭歭-w-j-dh''' ('''kalawjedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:daguerreotype|daguerreotype]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:daguerreotype|daguerreotype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-w-j-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kalawjedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
